message:
feat(download): add verified checksums for 4 bake-off models

Downloaded and computed SHA256 checksums for models with available ONNX:

**Embedders (verified):**
- Snowflake Arctic Embed S (133MB) - revision e596f507
- Nomic Embed v1.5 (547MB) - revision e5cf08aa

**Rerankers (verified):**
- MS-MARCO MiniLM L6 v2 (91MB) - revision c5ee24cb
  Note: Fixed repo name typo (L6 not L-6)
- Jina Reranker v1 Turbo EN (151MB) - revision b8c14f4e

**Models still pending (no standard ONNX available):**
- EmbeddingGemma - uses split files (model.onnx + model.onnx_data)
- Qwen3-Embedding - repo not found/private
- ModernBERT - no ONNX version available
- BGE Reranker v2 - uses split files (2.2GB+)
- Jina Reranker v2 - 1.1GB (could verify if needed)

All verified models now have:
- Pinned revisions (commit SHA, not "main")
- Real SHA256 checksums computed from downloaded files
- Accurate file sizes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
